node.title: Home Page
node.description: Landing page that displays all projects in a grid. Shows project thumbnails, status badges (processing/completed/failed), and key project metadata. Users can click to view project details or create new projects.

node.title: Upload Page
node.description: Project creation form where users upload 5-10 images/videos, write a prompt describing their video idea, and select a thumbnail. Initiates AI processing pipeline on submission.

node.title: Project Detail Page
node.description: Detailed project view with tabs for Media, Script, and Sandbox State. Shows all generated content (script, voiceover, music, animated videos), allows editing/regeneration, displays render pipeline status, and provides sandbox debugging tools.

node.title: Database Schema
node.description: Convex database schema defining projects table with fields for prompt, uploaded files, file metadata, generated content (script, audio, music, videos), processing status, sandbox state, and render progress.

node.title: Project Mutations
node.description: Convex mutations for project CRUD operations: createProject, addFilesToProject, updateProjectWithReelfulData, updateProjectStatus, updateProjectScript, updateRenderProgress, simulateCompleted, deleteProject.

node.title: Project Queries
node.description: Convex queries for fetching project data: getProjects (all projects with file URLs), getProject (single project with enriched data including storage URLs).

node.title: AI Processing Pipeline
node.description: Main orchestrator action that runs the full AI pipeline: 1) Generate script using GPT-5, 2) Generate voiceover with ElevenLabs + SRT, 3) Generate background music, 4) Animate images using FAL AI. Updates project status at each step.

node.title: Script Generation Service
node.description: Uses OpenAI GPT-5 to generate a 15-second social media script from user prompt. Creates engaging content with hook, value proposition, and call-to-action tailored for Instagram/TikTok/YouTube Shorts.

node.title: Voiceover Generation Service
node.description: Converts script to speech using ElevenLabs TTS API with character-level timestamps. Generates MP3 audio at 1.2x speed and creates word-level SRT subtitles. Uploads to Convex storage.

node.title: Music Generation Service
node.description: Generates background music using ElevenLabs music API. Duration is calculated as voiceover duration / 1.25 to match video length. Creates upbeat social media style tracks.

node.title: Image Animation Service
node.description: Animates static images into 3-second videos using FAL AI Kling Video v2.5 turbo model. Uploads images to FAL storage, processes with image-to-video AI, and returns animated video URLs.

node.title: Video Render Pipeline
node.description: Main rendering orchestrator that creates E2B sandbox with Remotion template, uploads all media files (videos, audio, music, SRT), runs Claude Code agent to create video composition, executes Remotion render, and uploads final video to Convex storage.

node.title: Sandbox Management
node.description: E2B sandbox lifecycle management: create/connect to sandbox, check sandbox status, run commands, list/read files, download files/folders, and monitor pipeline status (sandbox alive, media uploaded, sequence created, video rendered).

node.title: Step 1: Start Sandbox
node.description: Creates or connects to E2B sandbox with Remotion template. Checks if existing sandbox is alive, creates new one if needed. Sets up directory structure (public/media, public/reelful) and injects Claude Code OAuth token.

node.title: Step 2: Upload Files
node.description: Transfers all media assets to sandbox: original images/videos (with filenames preserved), voiceover audio (audio.mp3), background music (music.mp3), animated videos (video0.mp4, video1.mp4, etc), and SRT subtitle files.

node.title: Step 3: Run Video Editor (Claude)
node.description: Executes Claude Code agent via claude-agent.ts script in sandbox. Claude analyzes footage, extracts first frames from videos for context, decides editing sequence based on emotion/prompt, and creates Remotion composition with portrait orientation.

node.title: Step 4: Render Sequence
node.description: Runs 'bun remotion render' in sandbox to generate final video. Validates output file exists and is valid size, downloads from sandbox via downloadUrl API, uploads to Convex storage, and updates project with renderedVideoUrl.

node.title: Regenerate Script Action
node.description: Allows users to regenerate script with same prompt and images. Calls script generation service again and updates project with new script while preserving other generated content.

node.title: Regenerate Voiceover Action
node.description: Regenerates voiceover audio from existing script using ElevenLabs TTS. Useful for getting different voice characteristics or fixing audio issues.

node.title: Regenerate Music Action
node.description: Generates new background music track using ElevenLabs music API. Creates fresh upbeat social media music while maintaining same duration.

node.title: Regenerate Animations Action
node.description: Regenerates all animated videos from original images using FAL AI. Processes up to 3 images and creates new 3-second animated clips.

node.title: Animate Single Image Action
node.description: Animates a single image on-demand (triggered by hover + click in UI). Adds animated video to project's videoUrls array incrementally without regenerating all animations.
